import type { TableBuilderConfig, TableRow } from "../../components/tables/types";

export interface Row extends TableRow {
  "campaign": string;
  "owner": string;
  "type": string;
  "count": number;
  "updated": string;
}


export const tableConfig: TableBuilderConfig = {
  "title": "Media Assets",
  "description": "Browse and preview media assets across campaigns.",
  "direction": "ltr",
  "density": "comfortable",
  "pageSize": 6,
  "sortMode": "client",
  "paginationMode": "client",
  "expandableLayout": "gallery",
  "expandableIconStyle": "eye",
  "expandableIconPosition": "before-checkbox",
  "paginationLayout": "full",
  "pageSizeOptions": [
    5,
    10,
    20,
    50,
    100
  ],
  "virtualRowHeight": 44,
  "virtualMaxHeight": 520,
  "enableSearch": true,
  "enablePagination": true,
  "enableRowSelection": true,
  "enableDnD": false,
  "enableColumnVisibility": true,
  "enableExport": true,
  "enableStriped": false,
  "enableHover": true,
  "enableBordered": false,
  "enableStickyHeader": false,
  "enableExpandableRows": true,
  "enableInlineEdit": false,
  "enableBulkActions": false,
  "enableColumnResize": false,
  "enableMultiSort": true,
  "enableColumnFilters": true,
  "enableRowGrouping": false,
  "enableAggregation": false,
  "enableFooter": false,
  "columns": [
    {
      "id": "c1",
      "key": "campaign",
      "label": "Campaign",
      "type": "text",
      "sortable": true,
      "filterable": true,
      "visible": true,
      "align": "left",
      "width": 200
    },
    {
      "id": "c2",
      "key": "owner",
      "label": "Owner",
      "type": "avatar",
      "sortable": true,
      "filterable": true,
      "visible": true,
      "align": "left"
    },
    {
      "id": "c3",
      "key": "type",
      "label": "Type",
      "type": "badge",
      "sortable": true,
      "filterable": true,
      "visible": true,
      "align": "left",
      "badgeVariants": {
        "Image": "default",
        "Video": "secondary",
        "Doc": "outline"
      }
    },
    {
      "id": "c4",
      "key": "count",
      "label": "Assets",
      "type": "number",
      "sortable": true,
      "filterable": false,
      "visible": true,
      "align": "center"
    },
    {
      "id": "c5",
      "key": "updated",
      "label": "Updated",
      "type": "date",
      "sortable": true,
      "filterable": false,
      "visible": true,
      "align": "left"
    },
    {
      "id": "c6",
      "key": "actions",
      "label": "",
      "type": "actions",
      "sortable": false,
      "filterable": false,
      "visible": true,
      "align": "right"
    }
  ]
} as const satisfies TableBuilderConfig;
